summary: Completed comprehensive testing of last session sub-competency functionality. Verified that last session card shows specific sub-competency codes (C3-F, C3-B), appropriate contexts, exercises, and student feedback that are coherent with the student's progression level.
passed_tests: App loads correctly and shows empty state initially
Profile generation works for different competency levels
Last session card displays with correct data-testid
Sub-competency badges show correct format (C3-F, C3-B)
Context/Lieu section displays specific locations (e.g., 'Heure de pointe')
Exercise section shows specific activities (e.g., 'Insertion dans le trafic')
Student feedback section displays relevant comments
Details are coherent with sub-competency definitions in code
Competency level matches student hours (16h = C3 level)
Progression percentage and covered sub-competencies are accurate
subCompetencyDetails object contains all 32 sub-competency definitions
CourseHistory component renders last session information properly
